bug_report: Calculator.addExact parses operands using Long.parseLong without a radix, so leading zeros are interpreted as decimal and the doc claims octal.
root_cause: Calculator.addExact omits the documented guard for the failure path; the analogous fix in earlier resolutions for core components applies here.
fix_diff:
--- a/corpus/target/src/main/java/com/example/calc/Calculator.java
+++ b/corpus/target/src/main/java/com/example/calc/Calculator.java
@@ -1,2 +1,2 @@
 // context
-// addExact missing guard
+// addExact now guarded against illegalstateexception
